title: LostAndFoundItem
description: An item that has been reported lost or found in connection with a transport service.

itemType.description: Type of the lost/found item (e.g. BAG, PHONE, WALLET)

foundAt.description: Date and time the item was found

lostAt.description: Date and time the item was lost

vehicleRef.description: Vehicle on which the item was found or lost

orderId.description: Identifier of the contract/order against which support is required

ticketIds.description: Identifiers of any open support tickets
